name: 8ct Binder Rings - up&up™: Metal Book Rings for Index Cards, Silver Clips and Fasteners, 2.25" Width, 4.16" Height
description:
Hole punch your index cards and keep them together with these 8ct Binder Rings from up&up™. These binder clips gives you many options for sizing and is ideal for fastening any size document stack and keys as well. Constructed of metal, the up&up™ binder rings are suitable for loose-leaf, memo filing, key rings, scrapbook and more.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
